changes.description: New IReactions/v1 interface — add, remove, and list emoji reactions on messages
POST /Add — add a reaction to a message (max 20 unique emoji per message)
DELETE /Remove — remove the bot's own reaction from a message
GET /List — list all reactions on a message with count and user preview
New ReactionAdd event — fired when a user adds a reaction (requires Reactions intent)
New ReactionRemove event — fired when a user removes a reaction (requires Reactions intent)
Message history now includes reactions array with emoji, count, and user preview (up to 3 IDs)
Reaction user preview — userIds array capped at 3 entries on the wire; use count field for the full total
Rate limit: 60 requests/min
New requiredArchetypeId field on controls — restrict button/select interaction to members with a specific archetype
Controls sent via Reply and EditMessage now support requiredArchetypeId
Backend enforcement: InteractWithControl and InteractWithSelect return ARCHETYPE_REQUIRED error when user lacks the required archetype
Administrator bypass: users with ManageServer permission can always interact with archetype-constrained controls
Client visibility hint: requiredArchetypeId can be used by clients to hide controls from users without the archetype
Contract hash updated (RequiredArchetypeId added to BotControlV1)
Contract hash updated (RequiredArchetypeId added to BotControlV1)
New IArchetypes/v1 interface — list and inspect archetypes (roles) in a space
GET /List — list all visible archetypes with id, name, colour, isMentionable, isDefault
GET /Get — get a single archetype by ID
GET /ListMembers — list all members assigned to a specific archetype
Permissions bitmask only exposed when bot has ManageArchetype entitlement
New ArchetypeCreate event — fired when a new archetype is created in a space
New ArchetypeUpdate event — fired when an archetype is modified in a space
Rate limit added: 30 requests/min
New ITyping/v1 interface — send typing indicators to channels
POST /Start — trigger a typing indicator with optional kind (typing, thinking, uploading, searching)
POST /Stop — explicitly stop the typing indicator (auto-expires after 8 seconds)
New TypingStart event — fired when a user or bot starts typing in a channel
New TypingStop event — fired when a user or bot stops typing in a channel
Rate limit added: 60 requests/min
Bot typing auto-stop — typing indicator automatically expires after 8 seconds if not refreshed
POST /Ack — acknowledge an interaction, client shows brief confirmation
POST /Defer — defer an interaction, client shows loading state until bot follows up
POST /Modal — show a modal dialog with text inputs, selects, and checkboxes to the invoking user
New SelectInteraction event — fired when a user submits a select menu (String, User, Archetype, Channel)
New ModalSubmit event — fired when a user submits a modal form
New MessageEdit event — fired when a message is edited in a channel
Select controls — StringSelect, UserSelect, ArchetypeSelect, ChannelSelect with customId, placeholder, min/max values, and options
Modal components — TextInput (short/paragraph), StringSelect, UserSelect, ArchetypeSelect, ChannelSelect, Checkbox
InteractWithSelect channel method — submit select menu values, validated against allowed options
SubmitModal channel method — submit modal form values by interaction ID
Contract hash updated (Ack, Defer, Modal routes added)
Contract hash updated (MessageEdit event added)
EditBotMessage now broadcasts MessageEdited event via SignalR to connected clients
Interaction responses delivered via SignalR 'interactionResponse' method (Ack, Deferred, ShowModal)
Switched from token bucket to sliding window algorithm — no background timers, lazy window advancement
Added global concurrency limiter (10 parallel requests per bot) instead of unused global token bucket
Rate limit increased from 20 to 120 requests/min
Rate limit increased from 15 to 120 requests/min
Rate limit increased from 10 to 60 requests/min
Rate limit increased from 10 to 60 requests/min
Rate limit increased from 5 to 30 requests/min
Rate limit increased from 5 to 30 requests/min
Rate limit increased from 5 to 20 requests/min
Rate limit added: 15 requests/min
Own rate limit policy: 20 requests/min (was shared with IVoice)
Own rate limit policy: 10 requests/min (was shared with IVoice)
Rate limit added: 5 requests/min
New IInteractions/v1 interface — Reply to interactions, edit message text and controls
SendMessage now accepts optional 'controls' — rows of interactive buttons attached to messages
Message history now includes 'controls' in the response
New ControlInteraction event — fired when a user clicks a Callback button
New ControlInteractions intent (bit 13, value 8192)
Contract hash updated (controls field added to Send request and History response)
CommandInteraction event now includes interactionId as correlation token
Message Constructor — interactive playground in docs for building messages with entities and controls
OKLCH colour model for theme-adaptive button colours (L 0.40–0.80, C 0.00–0.37, H 0–360°)
IInteractions rate limit: 15 requests/min

title: Bot Lifecycle Events, Slash Commands & Rate Limits

changes.description: New botInstallingToSpace and botUninstallingFromSpace lifecycle events — sent directly to the bot when it is installed or removed from a space
CommandInteraction event — dispatched when a user invokes a slash command registered by the bot
Rate limiting applied: 10 requests per minute
Rate limiting applied: 10 requests per minute
Rate limiting applied: 5 requests per minute
Rate limit defaults now included in manifest (5 requests per minute)
Bot identity endpoints: GetMe, GetSpaces
Send messages and query message history
List, create, and delete channels
Get space info, list and get members
Kick members, manage archetypes
SSE event stream with intent filtering and resume
Slash command registration and management
Voice channel streaming token generation
